item.label: Use Rating
item.description: Here you can choose whether rating should be used.

item.label: Rating
item.description: Define your rating number from the list.

item.label: Upload Custom Quote Icon
item.description: Here you can choose whether custom icon should be used.

item.label: Select Quote Icon
item.description: Here you can define quote icon from the list.

item.label: Upload Quote Icon Image
item.description: Upload your custom quote icon or type in the URL of the icon image you would like to display.

item.label: Hide Quote Icon
item.description: Here you can choose whether quote should be hidden.

item.label: Reviewer Position
item.description: Here you can define reviewer position.

item.label: Reviewer Image Position
item.description: Here you can define reviewer image position.

item.label: Rating Position
item.description: Here you can define rating position.

item.label: Review Design
item.description: Here you can define review design layout.

item.label: Personal Website URL
item.description: Here you can define personal website URL of the reviewer.

item.label: Company URL
item.description: Here you can define company Website URL of the reviewer.

item.label: Open Links In New Tab
item.description: Here you can choose whether or not the reviewer links open in a new tab.

item.label: Content Alignment
item.description: Align content to the left, right or center.

item.label: Content Padding
item.description: Define custom padding for the content. Only applies when the reviewer image position is left or right.

item.label: Icon Placement
item.description: Define Placement for the quote icon.

item.label: Icon Alignment
item.description: Align icon to the left, right or center.

item.label: Icon Color
item.description: Here you can define a custom color for your icon.

item.label: Icon Background
item.description: Adjust the background color of the quote icon.

item.label: Custom Icon Background
item.description: Here you can define a custom background color for your icon. Only applies when a custom quote icon image is used.

item.label: Icon Size
item.description: Here you can define a custom size for your icon.

item.label: Icon Opacity
item.description: Define the opacity for the icon. Set the value from 0 - 1. The lower value, the more transparent.

item.label: Icon Padding
item.description: Here you can define custom padding for the icon.

item.label: Icon Spacing Top
item.description: Here you can define a custom spacing at the top of the icon.

item.label: Icon Spacing Bottom
item.description: Here you can define a custom spacing at the bottom of the icon.

item.label: Icon Position
item.description: Select Icon placement. Only applies when the icon placement is absolute.

item.label: Use Horizontal Position Center
item.description: If enabled Icon will be in horizontally center position.

item.label: Horizontal Offset
item.description: Icon Horizontal offset value.

item.label: Use Vertical Position Center
item.description: If enabled Icon will be in vertically center position.

item.label: Vertical Offset
item.description: Icon vertical offset value.

item.label: Image Placement
item.description: Define reviewer image placement. Only applies when the image position is absolute.

item.label: Use Horizontal Position Center
item.description: If enabled reviewer image will be placed horizontally center.

item.label: Image Offset X
item.description: Define horizontal offset value.

item.label: Use Vertical Position Center
item.description: If enabled reviewer image will be placed vertically center.

item.label: Image Offset Y
item.description: Define vertical offset value.

item.label: Image Placement
item.description: Define reviewer image placement. Only applies when the image position is relative to reviewer.

item.label: Image Spacing Left/Right
item.description: Define custom spacing for the image left/right.

item.label: Image Width
item.description: Define static width for the image.

item.label: Image Height
item.description: Define static height for the image.

item.label: Image Spacing Top
item.description: Here you can define a custom spacing at the top of the image.

item.label: Image Spacing Bottom
item.description: Here you can define a custom spacing at the bottom of the image.

item.label: Rating Spacing Top
item.description: Here you can define a custom spacing at the top of the rating.

item.label: Rating Spacing Bottom
item.description: Here you can define a custom spacing at the bottom of the rating.

item.label: Stars Size
item.description: Control the size of the stars by increasing or decreasing the range.

item.label: Stars Color
item.description: Here you can define a custom color for stars.

item.label: Stars Spacing Between
item.description: Here you can define the spacing between stars.

item.label: Name Spacing Bottom
item.description: Here you can define a custom spacing at the bottom of the reviewer name.

item.label: Title Spacing Bottom
item.description: Here you can define a custom spacing at the bottom of the reviewer title.

item.label: Review Spacing Top
item.description: Here you can define a custom spacing at the top of the review.

item.label: Review Spacing Bottom
item.description: Here you can define a custom spacing at the bottom of the review.

item.label: Bubble Background
item.description: Adjust the background color of the bubble area.

item.label: Bubble Padding
item.description: Define custom padding for the bubble area.

item.label: Bubble Border Radius
item.description: Corner radius of the bubble area in the D4 format "linked|top-left|top-right|bottom-right|bottom-left" (e.g. off|6px|6px|6px|6px).

item.label: Arrow Color
item.description: Define custom color for the bubble arrow.

item.label: Arrow Placement
item.description: Place the bubble arrow at the left, right or center.

item.label: Arrow Custom Position
item.description: Define arrow offset left/right value.

item.label: Reviewer Image
item.description: Upload reviewer image or type in the URL of the image you would like to display.

item.label: Image Alt Text
item.description: Here you can define the HTML ALT text for your image.

item.label: Reviewer Name
item.description: Define the name of the reviewer.

item.label: Title
item.description: Define the title/position of the reviewer.

item.label: Testimonial
item.description: Define the testimonial content.
